Release notes for Pebble Firmware v1.5, v1.5.1, and v1.5.3 detailing new features, fixes, and known bugs.

# Purpose
The document provides release notes for different versions of the Pebble E-Paper Watch firmware, specifically versions 1.5, 1.5.1, and 1.5.3. It details new features, fixes, and known bugs for each release. Version 1.5 introduces features such as "First Boot" mode, time setting from the watch, and a "Factory Reset" command. It also includes fixes for issues like SPI flash imaging reliability and reconnection with iPhone 5. Version 1.5.1 addresses a specific issue with new boards and empty SPI flash. Version 1.5.3 focuses on improving connection reliability and the speed of the factory Bluetooth test.
